task: multica-agent-plugin v0.8.0 npm package + Claude Code plugin marketplace

stories.title: bin/install.js: Node.js installer
acceptanceCriteria: bin/install.js exists and is executable (chmod +x)
Running 'node bin/install.js' detects multica CLI, python3, git, jq and prints status
Copies hooks/*.sh to ~/.claude/hooks/multica/ with correct permissions
Merges hook commands into ~/.claude/settings.json idempotently (JSONC compatible)
Hook commands in settings.json reference ~/.claude/hooks/multica/<script>.sh (stable path)
Writes MULTICA_PLUGIN_ROOT to shell profile (~/.zshrc or ~/.bashrc) if not already set
Detects shell type from $SHELL env var (zsh/bash/fish)
Prints clear feedback: '[install] hooks registered to: ~/.claude/settings.json'
'node bin/install.js --verify' checks hooks registered + multica CLI version
'node bin/install.js --uninstall' removes hooks from settings.json and ~/.claude/hooks/multica/
Idempotent: running twice produces same result without duplicate entries

stories.title: package.json + .claude-plugin/ manifest files
acceptanceCriteria: package.json exists with name=multica-agent-plugin, bin.multica-agent-plugin=bin/install.js
package.json files array includes: bin, hooks, skills, capabilities, docs, tools, .claude-plugin, VERSION, README.md
.claude-plugin/plugin.json exists with skills array listing skills/core/ and skills/advanced/
.claude-plugin/marketplace.json exists with $schema, name, description, plugins array
jq -e . .claude-plugin/plugin.json passes (valid JSON)
jq -e . .claude-plugin/marketplace.json passes (valid JSON)

stories.title: hooks/*.sh updated: use ~/.claude/hooks/multica/ stable path
acceptanceCriteria: hooks/hooks.json updated: hook commands reference ~/.claude/hooks/multica/*.sh instead of ${MULTICA_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/*.sh
install.sh updated with deprecation notice pointing to npx multica-agent-plugin
uninstall.sh updated to remove ~/.claude/hooks/multica/ and clean settings.json entries

stories.title: docs: full update across all affected files
acceptanceCriteria: docs/QUICKSTART.md: installation section shows 'npx multica-agent-plugin' as primary method
docs/QUICKSTART.md: no mention of manual 'export MULTICA_PLUGIN_ROOT' as required step
docs/QUICKSTART.md: Claude Code plugin marketplace install shown: '/plugin marketplace add https://github.com/yangliang2/multica-agent-plugin'
README.md: installation section updated to npx + plugin marketplace
docs/HUMAN-GUIDE.md: §1 Setup updated with new install flow
KNOWN-LIMITATIONS.md: removed manual MULTICA_PLUGIN_ROOT limitation
CLAUDE.md: Hooks Registration updated (hooks now in ~/.claude/hooks/multica/)
docs/AGENT-CONTRACT.md: env vars section updated
CHANGELOG.md contains [0.8.0] entry
VERSION contains 0.8.0

stories.title: smoke: all tests pass
acceptanceCriteria: bash tests/smoke/run-claude.sh exits 0 with FAIL: 0
node bin/install.js --help prints usage without error
jq -e . .claude-plugin/plugin.json passes
jq -e . .claude-plugin/marketplace.json passes
